FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Broadcom Inc. to Acquire VMware, Inc. in $61 Billion Transaction

SAN JOSE, Calif. — May 26, 2022 — Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) and VMware, Inc. (NYSE: VMW) today announced a definitive agreement under which Broadcom will acquire VMware in a cash-and-stock transaction valued at approximately $61 billion.

Under the terms of the agreement, VMware shareholders will receive either $142.50 in cash or 0.2520 shares of Broadcom common stock for each VMware share. The transaction values VMware at approximately $142.50 per share.

The transaction is expected to close in Broadcom's fiscal year 2023. The completion of the transaction is subject to receipt of required regulatory approvals, including antitrust clearance from the European Commission, the U.S. Hart-Scott-Rodino (HSR) Act, China's State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR), and other jurisdictions.

The transaction is also subject to the approval of VMware shareholders and other customary closing conditions. The outside date for the transaction is May 26, 2023, which may be extended to November 26, 2023 under certain circumstances.
